title: Chest Village
description:
This time I present you "Chest Village" Data pack.
this datapack just add a new type of village in the minecraft.
new village type like village plans it's village chest.
this chest village is different type of village.
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you "Chest Village" Data pack.
its just a simple structure datapack.
this datapack just add a new type of village in the minecraft.
new village type like village plans it's village chest.
this chest village is different type of village.
this new village is inside a big chest [Chest-Village].
this new village provide a big chest village and with 
advance villager.
all villagers are in master level.
additional 2 legend traders and 2 wandering traders
inside this new village there is a personal house for player to 
use as a base.
with all equipments and many more.

to use this datapack you have to create a new world to 
by using this datapack then the datapack work properly.
New world will have village chest in the new world.



You can locate the village by using command also
/locate structure minecraft:village_chest
/place structure minecraft:village_chest ~ ~ ~



This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.

version supported
form- 1.16 TO 1.20.4 Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Chest Village DataPack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
